children.heading: Statement of policy
children.label: a Statement of policy
children.text: Consistent with the Taiwan Relations Act ( et. seq.), it shall be the policy of the United States to maintain the capacity of the United States to resist a fait accompli that would jeopardize the security of the people on Taiwan.22 U.S.C. 33011So in original. The period probably should not appear.1

children.heading: Fait accompli defined
children.label: b Fait accompli defined
children.text: In this section, the term “fait accompli” refers to the resort to force by the People’s Republic of China to invade and seize control of Taiwan before the United States can respond effectively.
